notes: Public documentation must contain only user-facing concepts and released evidence; maintainer claim paths, workstream commands, contributor branches, and tuning seeds stay out of site navigation. Manuscript remains evidence-gated and must not convert development controls into confirmatory claims.
scope: Rebuild the public documentation architecture from current evidence, remove maintainer-only information, update and expand the Nature-style manuscript and source data, render and audit the PDF, repair release-blocking stale dimensions and evidence digests, build the static site, and publish both main and gh-pages without CI
